mode_selection_policy: Ask the run-mode startup question from loosest to strictest: full-auto, autonomous, guided, strict-gated. Do not record a formal mode until the user explicitly answers, unless all three startup answers are supplied in one explicit invocation sentence.
safe_automatic_install_policy: Project-local, reversible, non-secret tools and libraries may be installed automatically when needed for the active node, current chunk, or declared checks. Startup records a dependency plan and installs only minimal controller/check tooling; future dependencies are deferred until needed.
